description_long: This is a silver DeLorean sports car with a distinctive stainless steel body and gull-wing doors, featuring a futuristic and retro design. The rear of the car is heavily modified with exposed mechanical components, wiring, and tubing, including a large cylindrical device and various colored cables, suggesting advanced technology. The wheels are partially retracted, giving the impression of a hovering or transforming vehicle. The front fascia is flat with rectangular headlights and a low, wide stance, while the sides display smooth, angular lines and prominent wheel arches. The windows are tinted, and the roof is equipped with additional technical apparatus. The overall appearance is iconic, blending classic automotive styling with science fiction elements.
description: A silver DeLorean sports car with gull-wing doors, exposed rear technology, and partially retracted wheels, blending classic and futuristic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, gull-wing door outline, and detailed rear machinery with visible wiring and tubing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat nose, rectangular headlights, and wide stance, with technical components visible on the roof.
description_view_2: Side view from the right, mirroring the left but with a clearer view of the rear modifications and wheel structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the complex machinery, cylindrical device, and extensive wiring, with the license plate area visible.
attribute_wheel_design: solid disc wheels with a turbine-like pattern and no visible spokes
